# Changelog

## 1.0.0
- Initial release of `recon`.
- `SKILL.md`: when-to-use, arguments, how-it-works, cookbook routing, references.
- `cookbook/explore.md`: full reconnaissance pass — survey, dispatch, persist, summarize.
- `references/sections.md`: coverage checklist + the no-assumptions discipline.
- `references/workflow-template.js`: per-section read-only prompts and synthesis prompt with structured schemas that make "no assumptions" a structural property.
- `scripts/survey.py`: deterministic manifest builder (stdlib only) — entry docs, in-project skills, build/test/lint/CI configs, structure, code areas, focus deep-dive.
- Paths hardened to install-relative: artifact dir honors `RECON_ARTIFACT_DIR` (default `$HOME/.claude/recon/`); install path documented in README.
